title: Toll-Free Verification
html:
Carrier-side approval process required to send SMS from US toll-free numbers — vendor (e.g. telnyx) submits business details + opt-in form to carriers, who reject for CTIA compliance gaps. Yahir's outpace / vrtl pirates application sat in this loop Oct 21 → Nov 4 2025, four sequential rejections. First mentioned in 2025 10 22 screenshot 2025 10 22 at 7 51 16 pm 77463179.

#stub

related.label: Telnyx home — Brotell agency context, $5.07 credit
Telnyx ticket #2 — opt-in screenshot needed for Outpace SMS
Telnyx ticket #3 — opt-in consent form screenshot demand
Telnyx Toll-Free Verification queue — 4 Vrtl Pirates tickets pending
Telnyx Toll-Free Verification rejection — Vrtl Pirates website complaint
